import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
import parser
from pathlib import Path

pos_path = Path\('test_data/Test_Positions.csv'\)
hist_path = Path\('test_data/Test_History.csv'\)

positions_df = parser.load_fidelity_positions\(pos_path\)
history_df = parser.load_fidelity_history\(hist_path\)

print\('History columns:', list\(history_df.columns[:6]\)\)
print\('Action values:', history_df['Action'].unique\(\)\)
print\('Date sample:', history_df['Date'].iloc[0], type\(history_df['Date'].iloc[0]\)\)

unrolled = parser.unroll_tax_lots\(positions_df, history_df\)
print\(f'Unrolled lots: {len\(unrolled\)} \(expected 11\)'\)
spy_lots = unrolled[unrolled['Symbol'] == 'SPY']
print\(f'SPY cost basis sum: {spy_lots[\\"Cost Basis\\"].sum\(\)} \(expected 800.0\)'\)
" 2>&1)
